case_title: NATALIA SILVA et al VS. SOPHIE LAU

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILVA, NATALIA GORRELL, SARA DAVI-NOLAN, KATHRYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAU, SOPHIE $3,874.65 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,924.65, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S JUDGMENT FOR ALL AMOUNTS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFFS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
